notes: The openelis adaptor has no named operations; it re-exports a generic http namespace and prefixes every request with {baseUrl}/api/OpenELIS-Global/rest/ using HTTP Basic auth. Endpoints were documented from the OpenELIS-Global-2 Spring @RestController surface (v3.2.1.x): dashboards, patient search/management, sample orders, results, result validation, and reference dictionaries. Server base URL modeled as {host}/api/OpenELIS-Global with paths under /rest/. Large POST forms (SamplePatientEntry, LogbookResults, AccessionValidation) are modeled at a focused level. The adaptor JSDoc's 'referral-reasons' path has no matching server controller and was not included.
